elasticmapreduce.instancefleetconfig.ebs: `EbsBlockDeviceConfig` is a subproperty of the `EbsConfiguration` property type. `EbsBlockDeviceConfig` defines the number and type of EBS volumes to associate with all EC2 instances in an EMR cluster.

elasticmapreduce.instancefleetconfig.ebs.Description: EBS volume specifications such as volume type, IOPS, and size (GiB) that will be requested for the EBS volume attached to an EC2 instance in the cluster.
Number of EBS volumes with a specific volume configuration that will be associated with every instance in the instance group
